task: Remove the bottle from the pot and put it on the counter to the right
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A black pot sits on a stovetop. A white bottle with a red cap is inside the pot. The stovetop has a metallic surface. STRATEGY - First, reach into the pot to grasp the bottle. Then, lift the bottle out of the pot. Next, transport the bottle over the stovetop to the right side. Finally, place the bottle on the stovetop surface. Failure modes include dropping the bottle during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the pot to grasp the bottle by its body. Step 2: Lift the bottle out of the pot. Step 3: Transport the bottle over the stovetop to the right side. Step 4: Place the bottle on the stovetop surface.**
Goal: on(bottle, stovetop); stable(bottle)
Scene: pot, bottle, stovetop
Step 1: reach(pot)
  affordance_region: the body of the bottle inside the pot
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(bottle)
  affordance_region: the body of the bottle
  contact: holding(bottle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(bottle)
Step 3: transport(bottle -> stovetop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the stovetop to the right
  spatial: above(bottle, stovetop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(bottle)
  done_when: above(bottle, stovetop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(bottle -> stovetop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the stovetop to the right
  contact: surface_contact(bottle, stovetop) [completion]; released(bottle) [completion]
  pose: stable(bottle) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(bottle, stovetop) AND released(bottle)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the bottle inside the pot
an empty area on the stovetop to the right
an empty area on the stovetop to the right
